title: Standard Operating Procedure for automatic IGSN registration
author: Baldewein, Linda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This document contains deliverable D7 Standard Operating Procedure for automatic IGSN registration of the project FAIR W orkflows to establish I GSN for S amples in the H elmholtz Association (FAIR WISH) funded by the Helmholtz Metadata Collaboration (HMC). Deliverable D7 is part of work package 6 IGSN registration workflows for biogeochemical sample databases . In this document, a standard operating procedure is described, which can be used to automatically create CSV files containing IGSNs ready for registration. FAIR WISH was was funded 2022-2023 by the Initiative and Networking Fund of the Helmholtz Association (Helmholtz Metadata Collaboration HMC, Project Cohorte 2020).
